text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I hear you, my adoring fans, I hear you!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
All these voices ringing out in eager anticipation
of the appearance of the model student!
choice_data_list: Go and show them what you got!
Go and show them what you got!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Leave it to me! The perfect class representative,
heading out!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: You have my word as class representative!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Under the rules of Umamusume sportsmanship, I
vow to set a great example with a great Bakushin,
fair and square!
